name: BARCA Pier & Wine Bar

notes: POC catalog and every frozen item were coordinator-reconciled.
All four official-matrix search classes completed; direct positives are retained and missing disclosure remains unavailable.
POC closeout uses a verified target-specific catalog transformation; shared-parser review is deferred.
Coordinator terminal catalog derived from validated Luna research and serialized APPLY output.

adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

evidence.excerpt: Official homepage identifies BARCA Pier & Wine Bar and links/exposes all-day, Pier Beverage, Wine Bar Beverage, brunch and happy-hour content; menu widget content is not a complete allergen matrix.
notes: Official homepage identifies BARCA Pier & Wine Bar and links/exposes all-day, Pier Beverage, Wine Bar Beverage, brunch and happy-hour content; menu widget content is not a complete allergen matrix.

evidence.excerpt: Linked menu lists the all-day menu and menu tabs; states menu last updated 2026-05-13. Used as corroboration, not promoted over restaurant-issued content.

evidence.excerpt: Official homepage identifies the Alexandria location and presents the current all-day menu plus Pier Beverage Menu and Wine Bar Beverage Menu. Food descriptions include the frozen baseline items and additional current items.

evidence.excerpt: Third-party menu corroborates the all-day menu and reports a menu update in May 2026.

evidence.excerpt: FAQ says vegan and gluten-free items are marked V or G; no complete contains/may-contain matrix or cross-contact policy.
